name: Italian Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 Sausage links (skinned, cooked and drained well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-bake the pie shell.
2. Place the sausage on the bottom of the crust.
3. Blend the eggs, cheeses, and seasoning.
4. Pour the mixture over the sausage.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until the center is almost firm.
